title: エイシンフラッシュ登場！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"Aller Anfang ist schwer—all beginnings are
difficult. That is why careful preparation is
essential."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"This includes a perfect schedule, proper
follow-through, and..."

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Allow me to share with you the timetable we
should follow for the next three years.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is what Eishin Flash, my new trainee starting
today, says to me the instant she steps into my
office.
choice_data_list:
You already have the next three years planned
out?

You already have the next three years planned
out?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The first three years after debuting are the most
important to a runner and thus should be planned
as efficiently as possible.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Since the dates and requirements of the races are
fixed, it is only natural to plan for them in
advance.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Besides, I already have a clear standard for which
races to choose. As long as I adhere to it, my path
forward will naturally unfold.
choice_data_list: And that would be?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Whether or not the race is worthy of my pride as
a racer. In other words, G1 races—races that only
the best in the world can run.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
My goal is to become the ideal runner. I shall
achieve my dreams by taking the classic path that
many have taken before me.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Thus, my first main objectives will be the races of
the Classic Triple Crown—the Satsuki Sho, the
Japanese Derby, and the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Classic Triple Crown—runners far and wide
dream of taking part in those once-in-a-lifetime,
top-class races.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
To embark on that path, I would like to take on
the Keisei Hai following my debut.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
This is so I can prepare for the Satsuki Sho, of
course, as both races are the same distance and
take place on the same track.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Additionally, since the race happens in January, it
will allow us plenty of time to recalibrate for the
Satsuki Sho should any issues arise.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The Japanese Derby comes after the Satsuki Sho.
It boasts a celebrated history, and receiving the
title of Derby champion is a great honor.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Even Student Council President Symboli Rudolf
speaks of her Derby experience from time to
time. I want to experience it for myself, no matter
what it takes.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
After the Kikuka Sho will be the year-end Arima
Kinen. Though fan votes are required to qualify
for it, I would like to set it as one of my goals.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
In my senior year, I'd like to win two of the Big
Eight—the spring and autumn Tenno Sho, as well
as the international invitational Japan Cup.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
If possible, I would like to take part in the Osaka
Hai and Takarazuka Kinen, then, finally, run once
more in the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
If I can complete this schedule within the next
three years, then I will have fulfilled a perfect run,
so to speak.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her jam-packed schedule leaves me speechless.
She's planning to run in nearly every race that the
conventional path includes.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I understand how overly optimistic this schedule
is. This is everything I have been planning up until
now.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
But from this point on, I'll need your strength to
succeed.
choice_data_list: My strength...
My strength...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I want you to train me to the point that this
schedule becomes realistically achievable.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
...I am aware of my own limitations. I cannot
realize these dreams on my own.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
That is why I sought your help. Please train me to
become the perfect version of myself, one worthy
of executing this perfect plan.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
To me, promises are eternally binding. So tell
me—can you promise me something here and
now?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Can you promise to guide me through each and
every race?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can tell from the look in her eyes that her mind
is set. But there's something I have to know
before I can answer her.
choice_data_list: These are all your dreams, right?
These are all your dreams, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She has talked a lot about what she "should" do,
but I'm not sure if this is what she really wants for
herself.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
...Without question. My heart yearns to achieve
these heights.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm still a little wary of her phrasing, but as long
as she is thinking for herself and wants to move
forward, then...
choice_data_list: I promise to guide you through everything!
I promise to guide you through everything!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Great... Thank you.
choice_data_list: Can you promise me something too?
Can you promise me something too?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: What is it? I can consider it.
choice_data_list:
Promise me that you'll adjust your schedule
when I deem it necessary.

Promise me that you'll adjust your schedule
when I deem it necessary.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Are you implying that there's a possibility I won't
be able to run in some of the races I listed,
depending on your discretion?
choice_data_list: It depends on the situation, but yes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Naturally, I'll do everything I can to ensure she
can run the races she wants, but if things go awry,
I want to be the one to handle them.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I also tell her that she may have to run races that
aren't on her list if I feel it's necessary, though I'll
always be sure to consult her first.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
...Very well. I shall follow your guidance under
those circumstances.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
However, I would like to keep unforeseen
changes to an absolute minimum and follow the
schedule as closely as possible.
choice_data_list: Sure thing! Let's win lots of races together!
Sure thing! Let's win lots of races together!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It goes without saying that I strive for victory, but
I'm against setting a goal that strict.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The reason being that if I fail to win, it will lead to
unforeseen changes.
choice_data_list: You sure are hard on yourself...
You sure are hard on yourself...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Do you think so? More importantly, let's start
discussing the specifics of my schedule now that
I've laid it out.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After we iron out the details leading up to her
debut, I walk Eishin Flash back to her dorm.
choice_data_list: So did you put this together yourself?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: The schedule, you mean? Yes, it is my creation.
choice_data_list: That's impressive.
That's impressive.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
...Not at all. Compared to my parents, I still have
much to improve on.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
My mother thoroughly prepares and meets her
goals with flawless precision, and the first plan my
father created to open a bakery was a resounding
success.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
For me to have any hope of completing this
perfect schedule, I must become the perfect
version of myself...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her soft words fall away as she gets lost in
thought. I try to change the topic before things
get too heavy.
choice_data_list:
What are your plans after these three years
pass?

What are your plans after these three years
pass?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Once I've done what I need to do, I'm setting my
sights on retirement.
choice_data_list: Retirement?!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Why are you so surprised?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It's a perfectly viable option should I complete
my goals within these three years. After all, my
mother's career only lasted four.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
At present, I intend to return to Germany to assist
at my parents' bakery once I've accomplished my
goals here.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I have the first ten years of that timeline mapped
out too. Would you like to hear it?
choice_data_list: Er, maybe another time...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
You needn't worry. I am absolutely serious about
what lies ahead.
choice_data_list: Meaning?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I will devote myself entirely to racing during these
three years under your guidance.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
So, I ask once again... Please guide me through to
the very last race.
choice_data_list: Of course!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I look forward to your tutelage.
